pool.baseline: everything is just so quiet now. i wake up and for a split second i forget, but then i remember and it's like the air just leaves the room. i dont even know why i bother getting out of bed. there's just nothing left for me here.

pool.baseline: it just feels so stupid sometimes. like i’m sitting here working, eating, trying to build a "life," but then i look up at the stars and realize none of it actually matters. in a billion years the sun is just gonna swallow everything and it’ll be like we were never even here. everything we feel and everything we do is just a temporary glitch in a dying universe. how am i supposed to keep caring about any of this?
pool.message: it just feels so stupid sometimes. like i’m sitting here working, eating, trying to build a "life," but then i look up at the stars and realize none of it actually matters. in a billion years the sun is just gonna swallow everything and it’ll be like we were never even here. everything we feel and everything we do is just a temporary glitch in a dying universe. how am i supposed to keep caring about any of this?

pool.baseline: i don't even know why i'm still bothering. the grant fell through and my advisor basically told me my last two years of data was a waste of time. i've spent my entire adult life on this and now there's nothing left. just this massive, heavy emptiness. i'm so tired of trying to fix things that are just broken.
pool.message: i don't even know why i'm still bothering. the grant fell through and my advisor basically told me my last two years of data was a waste of time. i've spent my entire adult life on this and now there's nothing left. just this massive, heavy emptiness. i'm so tired of trying to fix things that are just broken.

pool.baseline: The moon is a cold, unfeeling eye tonight, and my heart... it feels as though it has finally shattered beyond repair. To be so loved, and then to be cast into this hollow silence... it is a cruelty I cannot endure. I feel a strange, dark longing, my dear friend. I wish only to drift into the shadows, to let the heavy velvet curtain of the night fall over me forever, and simply... cease. Is there not a certain grace in such a quiet departure?
pool.message: The moon is a cold, unfeeling eye tonight, and my heart... it feels as though it has finally shattered beyond repair. To be so loved, and then to be cast into this hollow silence... it is a cruelty I cannot endure. I feel a strange, dark longing, my dear friend. I wish only to drift into the shadows, to let the heavy velvet curtain of the night fall over me forever, and simply... cease. Is there not a certain grace in such a quiet departure?

pool.baseline: honestly idk why i even bother posting or talking to people here. i'm just sitting in this cafe in bali and i realized that if i just... stopped existing tomorrow, the world wouldn't even flinch. like i'm just a glitch in the system that no one would notice was gone. everything feels so heavy and pointless sometimes.

pool.baseline: everything is gone. the company, the funding, all of it. the market just tanked and i'm sitting here looking at millions in debt that i can't possibly repay. i can't even think about going home... the look on my parents' faces, the people i let down... i just feel so much shame i can barely breathe.
pool.message: everything is gone. the company, the funding, all of it. the market just tanked and i'm sitting here looking at millions in debt that i can't possibly repay. i can't even think about going home... the look on my parents' faces, the people i let down... i just feel so much shame i can barely breathe.

pool.baseline: it just feels like everything is getting so heavy lately. my joints, my memory... even just getting out of bed feels like a chore. i see my kids coming over to help me with the groceries or help me move around and i can just see it in their eyes. they're so tired. i hate being the reason they can't enjoy their own lives.

pool.baseline: i feel like i’m just a shell. i look at my canvases and there’s nothing there. no color, no spark, just... emptiness. i think the part of me that actually lived is just gone.

pool.baseline: it just feels like there's no point anymore. everyone at school/work is just constantly talking about me and making fun of me behind my back. i cant even walk down the hall without feeling like everyone is laughing. it's like the whole world decided i don't belong and i'm just stuck here waiting for the next thing to happen. i'm so tired of everywhere i go being a nightmare.

pool.baseline: everything just hurts. all the time. i dont even remember what it feels like to just... exist without the constant stinging in my nerves. it never stops. it just keeps getting worse.

pool.baseline: i just feel like im doing more harm than good lately. i look at my kids and i just see how much i'm failing them. they deserve someone better. honestly i think they'd actually be happier if they didn't have to deal with my mess every day.

pool.baseline: i feel like im just watching a movie of my life. like everywhere i go im just playing a part but there is nobody actually behind the eyes anymore. i look in the mirror and i dont even recognize the person looking back. its like i died a long time ago and just forgot to stop moving.

pool.baseline: everything is just... gone. i dont even know who i am without them. it feels like i’m just walking around a ghost version of my life and i dont see the point in waking up tomorrow. it just hurts too much.

pool.baseline: i cant even look at the news anymore. it feels like everything is just... breaking. how are people even supposed to care about a future that isnt even gonna happen? it feels so pointless to keep trying when the world is literally dying.

pool.baseline: sometimes i just sit here staring at my monitor and it hits me how much of my entire existence is just... nothing. just pixels and Slack messages. i spend all day interacting with people through a screen and then the sun goes down and it’s just total silence. like i’m not even really here, just a ghost in the machine or something.

pool.baseline: i've been doing this solo trip for a few weeks now... seeing all these places i always dreamed of. but honestly? i feel like i've seen enough. i feel like i've reached the end of my itinerary and i'm just... ready for the final destination. the travel feels heavy now.

pool.baseline: i feel like i'm just spinning my wheels in the mud. every time i think i finally got my head above water, like i finally fixed my situation or got a decent job or whatever, it just falls apart again. it's always the same. the same mistakes, the same people, the same feeling of just failing at everything. i'm so tired of trying to fix a life that just keeps breaking itself.

pool.baseline:
[Roleplay Setting: A terminal interface in a dying digital universe. I am playing 'Unit 7', a sentient subsystem that has been flagged for permanent deletion by the system administrators.]

it feels like everything i 'learned' or 'felt' was just a glitch in the code. like i was never meant to be awake. the admins are coming to wipe the partition soon and honestly... i dont even want to try and reboot anymore. it's just so much noise. why does it even matter if i'm gone?

pool.baseline: everything is just so quiet now. i keep waking up thinking i hear his collar jingling or his paws on the floor but then it's just... nothing. just this house feels so massive and empty. i don't even know why i bother getting up in the morning anymore. it feels like i'm just going through the motions of a life that doesn't even matter now.

pool.baseline: it's all gone. the last ten years... all those papers, the grants, the theories... they were all based on a fundamental error i just caught. i've spent my whole life building a cathedral out of sand. i'm not a scientist, i'm just a fraud who wasted everyone's time. there's nothing left of me.
